title: Papuri sa Diyos
lyrics:
Papuri sa Diyos

[Chorus]
Purihin ninyo ang Panginoon Dakilain ang Kanyang Ngalan Purihin, Siya ay awitan
At papurihan magpakailanman

[Verse 1]
Nilikha Niya ang langit at lupa Nilikha Niya ang araw at buwan Nilikha Niya ang mga isda't ibon Mga gubat at karagatan

[Pre-Chorus 1]
Tunay Siyang banal at dakila Purihin ang Kanyang ngalan
Ang lahat ng nilikha Niya'y mabuti Pinagyaman Niya ng lubusan

[Chorus]
Purihin ninyo ang Panginoon Dakilain ang Kanyang Ngalan Purihin, Siya ay awitan
At papurihan magpakailanman

[Verse 2]
Nilalang ng Panginoon ang tao Sa sarili Niyang larawan Nilalang Niya ang sangkatauhan Binigyan Niya ng kalayaan

[Pre-Chorus 2]
Tunay Siyang banal at dakila Purihin ang Kanyang Ngalan Kahit nagkasala ang tao
Minahal Niya pa rin nang lubusan

[Chorus]
Purihin ninyo ang Panginoon Dakilain ang Kanyang Ngalan Purihin, Siya ay awitan
At papurihan magpakailanman

title: Panginoon maawa ka sa amin
lyrics:
Panginoon maawa Ka sa amin.// O Kristo maawa Ka sa amin.//
Panginoon maawa Ka sa amin.//

title: Gloria (Maramba)
lyrics:
Gloria (Maramba)
[Chorus]
Gloria, gloria, in excelsis deo. Gloria, gloria, in excelsis deo. Gloria, gloria, in excelsis deo.

[Verse 1]
At king yatu kapayapan karing taung Keyang kaluguran.
Guinung Diyos, 
Ari ning banwa,
Mayupayang Diyos at Ibpa. 
Sasamban Daka,
Pasalamatan Daka, 
Pupuryan Daka,
Pauli ning Kekang ligaya!

[Verse 2]
Guinung Jesu-Kristo,
Bugtung nang Anak ning Ibpa, Guinung Diyos,
Kordero ning Diyos;
Ikang milalako king kasalanan ning yatu,
Pacaluluan mu kami.
Ikang makalukluk king wanan ning Ibpa.
Tanggapan mu ing panalangin mi

[Verse 3]
Uling Ikang bukud ing banal 
Ikang bukud ing Guinu!
Ikang Bukud ing kakatas-kata-asan, JesuKristo. 
Kagum ning Espiritung Banal,
King liga-aya ning Diyos Ibpa. 

Amen, amen, amen!

title: Alleluia (Marcelo)
lyrics:
Take and receive

Take and receive, o Lord, my liberty Take all my will, my mind, my memory All things I hold and all I own are Thine Thine was the gift, to Thee I all resign

Do Thou direct and govern all and sway Do what Thou wilt, command, and I obey Only Thy grace, Thy love on me bestow
These make me rich, all else will I forego

Do Thou direct and govern all and sway 
Do what Thou wilt, command, and I obey
Only Thy grace, Thy love on me bestow
These make me rich, all else will I forego

title: Holy (light)
lyrics:
Holy (light)

Holy, holy, holy, Lord God of host. Heaven and earth are full of your glory, 
full of your glory.
Hosanna in the highest! 
Hosanna in the highest!

Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord. 
Hosanna in the highest!
Hosanna in the highest! 
Hosanna in the highest! 
Hosanna in the highest!

title: When we eat (light)
lyrics:
When we eat (light)

When we eat this bread and drink this cup 
we proclaim your death o Lord.
Until you come again, 
until you come again 
we proclaim your death o Lord.

title: Amen Alleluia (Purihin ang Diyos)
lyrics:
Amen, amen, amen, amen, alleluia! Purihin ang Diyos, purihin ang Diyos Amen alleluia!
Amen, amen, amen, amen, alleluia!

title: Ama namin
lyrics:
Ama namin 
Ama namin 
Sumasalangit ka
Sambahin ang ngalan mo 
Mapasaamin ang kaharian mo 
Sundin ang loob mo
Dito sa lupa
Para nang sa langit
Bigyan mo po kami ngayon
Ng aming kakanin sa araw-araw 
At patawarin mo kami
Sa aming mga sala
Para ng pagpapatawad namin Sa nagkakasala sa amin
At huwag mo kaming ipahintulot sa Tukso 
at iadya mo kami Sa lahat ng masama

title: Sapagkat
lyrics:
Sapagkat

Sapagkat sayo ang kaharian, kapangyarihan, at kapurihan. 
Ngayon at magpakailanman, 
ngayon at magpakailanman

title: Kordero ng Diyos (Fr. Arnel Aquino)
lyrics:
Kordero ng Diyos (Fr. Arnel Aquino)

Kordero ng Diyos na nag aalis ng mga kasalanan ng sanlibutan.
Maawa Ka sa amin. 
Maawa Ka sa amin.
Kordero ng Diyos na nag aalis ng mga kasalanan ng sanlibutan.
Maawa Ka sa amin. 
Maawa Ka sa amin.

Kordero ng Diyos na nag aalis ng mga kasalanan ng sanlibutan.
Ipagkaloob mo sa amin ang kapayapaan.

title: Let me be the bearer
lyrics:
Let me be the bearer

(G)
Every day I sing to You with all my heart
Hear my pray'r, I raise them all into Your hands 

(B)
Come to me and keep me safe in your arms Strengthen me to face the day
For You I stand

[Pre-Chorus] (G)
Even there is sadness, stay with me And fill me with your joy endlessly 

(B)
Lord, help me understand 
To follow your commands
I entrust my life into your care

[Chorus] (All)
My Lord, fill me with your love Fill me with your truth
Fill me with your kindness
My Lord, let your goodness shine Let me speak your truth
Let me be the bearer of your love

[Verse 2] 
(B)
Every day, Let me proclaim and testify In your word, 
Show me your way
For you are light 

(G)
You alone can bring all wonders in this life 
Heal all wounds and take all worries I hide

(G)
Even if there’s Darkness stay with me 
And in your hands I hold faithfully 

(B)
Lord,Fill your grace inside, 
Grant me what you desire
I raise all my voice 
Lord, sing with me

[Chorus](All)
My Lord, fill me with your love Fill me with your truth
Fill me with your kindness
My Lord, let your goodness shine Let me speak your truth
Let me be the bearer of your love

[Chorus](All)
My Lord, fill me with your love Fill me with your truth
Fill me with your kindness
My Lord, let your goodness shine Let me speak your truth
Let me be the bearer of your love

[Coda](all)
Let me speak your truth
Let me be the bearer of your love

title: I will sing
lyrics:
I will sing

Ooh... mamaye do bap bareva 
Shiva pwe yo rap bareya 
Moreva shimbe bap bayevo reva Mamaye do bap bareva
Shiva pwe yo rap bareya 
Hulele bap ba novara 
Do bap bara

I will sing forever of Your love, O Lord 
I will celebrate the wonder of Your name 
For the word that You speak 
is a song of forgiveness
And a song of gentle mercy and of peace

Let us wake at the morning and be filled with Your love
And sing songs of praise all our days
For Your love is as high as the heavens above us 
And Your faithfulness as certain as the dawn

I will sing forever of Your love, O Lord 
I will celebrate the wonder of Your name 
For the word that You speak is a song of forgiveness
And a song of gentle mercy and of peace

I will sing forever of Your love, O Lord 
For You are my refuge and my strength
You fill the world with Your life-giving spirit 
That speaks Your word
Your word of mercy and of peace

CODA:

And I will sing forever of Your love, O Lord
Yes I will sing forever of Your love, O Lord
